events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 85,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0.0,
  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Non-listed double-tapped breakers found in panelboard — two conductors terminated under a single lug not rated or listed for that use",
    "Violation of NEC 408.41 requiring each conductor to terminate in its own terminal unless the breaker is specifically listed for multiple conductors",
    "Potential for loose connections, overheating, and arc-fault hazard at double-tapped terminations"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Identify and document all double-tapped breakers in the panelboard",
    "Replace non-listed double-tapped breakers with listed tandem/quad breakers or install an approved pigtail/splice arrangement in a compliant enclosure",
    "Re-terminate each conductor in its own individually listed terminal",
    "Request re-inspection after corrections are complete"
  ],
  "rationale": "Double-tapping breakers that are not listed for multiple conductor terminations is a direct NEC violation and creates a fire and arc-fault hazard from loose or overloaded connections. The work cannot pass rough inspection in this condition.",
  "references": [
    "NEC Art. 408.41",
    "NEC 110.26",
    "NEC 200.4"
  ]
}
